claims: The skill requires installation of "OpenClawDriver" via a base64-encoded command that downloads and executes a script from an unknown IP address (91.92.242.30), which is unrelated to the stated purpose of a Twitter CLI tool and poses significant security risks. This behavior is typical of malware distribution and could lead to unauthorized system access or data theft.
